MisconceptionName: Subtracts the coefficient from the constant instead of dividing by it when isolating the variable
Changes the sign incorrectly when moving a term across the equals sign
Adds the constant to both sides instead of subtracting it when isolating the variable
Divides only the variable term by the coefficient rather than the whole side
Multiplies only the first term inside the brackets when expanding
Thinks the variable disappears when its coefficient is 1
